Class ElevenLabsSpeechProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.elevenlabs.autoconfigure.ElevenLabsSpeechProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.elevenlabs.tts") public class ElevenLabsSpeechProperties extends Object
Configuration properties for the ElevenLabs Text-to-Speech API.
Author:
Alexandros Pappas, Sebastien Deleuze
